signals.headline: Congress and IUML finalize seat-sharing: Congress to contest 95 seats, IUML 27 seats in 140-seat Kerala Assembly electio
signals.raw:
Congress and IUML finalize seat-sharing: Congress to contest 95 seats, IUML 27 seats in 140-seat Kerala Assembly elections | YES | HIGH confidence**[6]

This agreement resolves ongoing negotiations within the UDF alliance, where IUML had aggressively pushed for around 30 seats (up from 25 in 2021), citing strong local body poll performance, but settled at 27—matching a prior unfulfilled promise**[

signals.raw: **IMF forecast** on April 14 raised 2026 inflation to **2.5%** (mid-2% range), citing Middle East energy shocks[5][6].
